# M5 switching, visual-system, attention, and boundary evidence index

<!-- Generated by tools/regenerate_xt12_certification_matrix.py. Do not hand-edit. -->

Canonical matrix: `artifacts/release/m5/xt12-qualification-matrix.json` · as of **2026-06-09** · publication decision: **hold**.

This index is the canonical evidence map for the M5 closeout certification lane. Release center, Help/About, support exports, and docs/public-truth publication ingest the matrix it summarizes instead of cloning status text. Every marketed M5 surface ends the milestone **qualified**, **narrowed**, or **held back**, backed by the per-dimension evidence bound below.

## Closeout summary

- Marketed surfaces: **7**
- Qualified / narrowed / held back: **2 / 2 / 3**
- Release-blocking surfaces below the cutline: **1** of 3
- Certification cells (pass/partial/fail/stale/missing/waived): 61/2/2/2/2/1

## Surface certification states

| Surface | Posture | Ceiling | Published | XT state | Release-blocking |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| M5 Framework family | local_only | stable | stable | Qualified | yes |
| M5 AI-adjacent family | mirrored | stable | stable | Qualified | yes |
| M5 Notebook family | local_only | stable | preview | Held back | no |
| M5 Data-rich family | local_only | stable | beta | Narrowed | no |
| M5 Review family | local_only | stable | preview | Held back | no |
| M5 Companion family | browser_handoff | stable | beta | Narrowed | no |
| M5 Managed-depth family | managed | stable | preview | Held back | yes |
